_readme: Copy to ~/.config/opencode/config.json — Start the server first: ./scripts/provision.sh -m <model> — Verify model id: curl http://localhost:11434/v1/models — Model ids must match exactly (including :latest tag for Ollama; no tag for llama.cpp)
_backends: Ollama model ids use ':latest' suffix (e.g. 'glm4:latest'). llama.cpp model ids are derived from the GGUF filename without extension (e.g. 'glm-4-9b-chat-Q4_K_M'). Update the model name below to match your active backend.
